title: Cobblemon - Trunkified
description: A Cobblemon resourcepack and datapack that adds some of the Fakemon from the Clumpy Bros YouTube channel!
body:
![Clumpy Bros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18687dd80feef348a9375afdcfb28892c8b76e73.png)

This is a resource pack and a data pack. It adds 23 Fakemon to Cobblemon! Out of the 23 Fakemon there are currently 3 legendaries. All of these Fakemon can be seen in the Clumpy Bros YouTube videos.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gKvBnr3RDI4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Install the [Clumpy Bros Burgers R Cool](https://modrinth.com/project/7COxnjtL) mod for more spawn locations. There is a whole dimension where these Fakemon can spawn when using that mod. It is not a requirement though adding that mod is only a suggestion.

<details>
<summary>Spawn Locations</summary>

- Beach: Pie

- Dark Forest: PieZombie, Super Golem, Bortymus

- Deep Dark: Halama, Jama, Halamajama

- Desert: PZombie

- End, End Highlands: Halukyombor, Camloymus

- Forest: Clunky, Trunk

- Jungle: Trunky

- Nether: Trickstomby, Burger Boy

- Plains: Scott Stapp

- Spooky: Pomayikunky, Burger Car

- Swamp: Trunkster

- Underground Ores: Kaybork - iron ore and deepslate iron ore, Kerp - gold ore and deepslate gold ore, Klikstor - diamond ore and deepslate diamond ore, Clikstor - redstone ore and deepslate redstone ore.

- Burger Dimension: If you have the Burgers R Cool Mod installed all of my Fakemon will spawn there as well.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Evolution Lines and Levels</summary>

- Clunky > Trickstomby > Pomayikunky > Halukyombor
  - Evolution Levels: 16 > 36 > 69

- Halama > Jama > Halamajama
  - Evolution Levels: 16 > 36

- Kaybork > Kerp > Klikstor > Clikstor
  - Evolution Levels: 16 > 36 > 69

- Pie > PZombie > PieZombie
  - Evolution Levels: 16 > 36

- Trunk > Trunkster > Trunky
  - Evolution Levels: 16 > 36
</details>


<details>
<summary>Types</summary>

- Clunky: Electric
- Trickstomby: Electric/Ghost
- Pomayikunky: Electric/Ghost
- Halukyombor: Electric/Ghost
- Halama: Dark
- Jama: Dark/Poison
- Halamajama: Dark/Poison
- Kaybork: Normal
- Kerp: Normal/Electric
- Klikstor: Normal/Electric
- Clikstor: Normal/Electric
- Pie: Ice
- PZombie: Ice/Bug
- PieZombie: Ice/Bug
- Trunk: Grass
- Trunkster: Grass/Ground
- Trunky: Grass/Ground
- Burger Car: Normal
- Scott Stapp: Fire/Rock
- Super Golem: Steel
- Bortymus: Fire/Water
- Camloymus: Grass/Flying
- Burger Boy: Steel/Fairy
</details>



<details>
<summary>Click for Installation Instructions</summary>
Singleplayer:
  
- Put the .zip in /saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks
- Put the .zip in /resourcepacks
  - Make sure you enable the resource pack to do this on the main menu go to options > resource packs and enable the pack or if you are in game press ESC > options > resource packs and enable the pack

Server:
- Put the .zip in /world/datapacks
  - All players on your server will still need the resource pack enabled
  - If you are unsure on how to do this follow your server providers guide on how to add a datapack
</details>

<details>
<summary>Removed Features</summary>
Some features that are displayed in the videos may not be in this pack. You can check the readme in the pack to figure out what features are not included.
</details>

For any questions or issues not answered on this page or in the readme join the Discord for support.

[![Join our Discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d7f865966f83b55f1d9158c9c1d0c617106f91.png)](https://discord.gg/NcmC8e8CvA)
